interpretation.purpose: measure whether captured temporal metadata is consumed by retrieval before T-MAIN activation
interpretation.expected_gap: capture exists; temporal query-mode routing is not wired until CP11

anti_gaming: The diagnostic remains separate from frozen retrieval gates and cannot change their scores.
Expected files and metadata evidence are fixed before the first diagnostic query.
No query text or expected filename may appear in retrieval routing code.
All sources must belong to the response-discovered 15-document E2E corpus.
